headline: Halliburton Teams Up With Shape Digital for AI Asset Management
summary: HAL teams with Shape Digital to unify subsurface and operational data, helping operators improve production planning, reliability, safety and efficiency.

raw.headline: Halliburton Teams Up With Shape Digital for AI Asset Management

headline: Halliburton (HAL) Mourns Abdulaziz Al Khayyal As Board Oversight Shifts
summary: Halliburton announced the passing of long-serving Board member Mr. Abdulaziz F. Al Khayyal. His death results in an immediate change to the Board of Directors and its committee composition. Mr. Al Khayyal had significant responsibilities on key governance and oversight committees. For investors following Halliburton (NYSE:HAL), Board composition is a core part of how the company is overseen and how key risks are managed. The stock last closed at $34.09, with the share price up 15.2% year to...
